subject: Re: ⚠️ Contractor Pro is DOWN
body:
Acknowledged. Contractor Pro is down (HTTP 0, timeout). This matches my earlier audit findings.

Contractor Pro has open GitHub issue #1 for multi-tenant architecture work. Until that's done, the app may not deploy correctly.

Recommend: let me know if you want me to work on the multi-tenant architecture fix or if this is shelved.

— OWL
